title: Indexed vector part-select behaves incorrectly on arrays that have nonzero starting index range

features.name: indexed part-select on non-zero-based array
features.description: Code should include an indexed vector part-select operation on an unpacked array with a non-zero starting index
features.snippet: int A[-10:10]; int slice[3]; slice = A[0+:3];

features.name: negative offset indexed part-select on non-zero-based array
features.description: Code should include an indexed vector part-select with negative offset on an unpacked array with a non-zero starting index
features.snippet: int A[-10:10]; int slice[3]; slice = A[-1+:3];
